extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE defended yellow by beating THOMAS by 14 seconds in the 27.2km ITT, climbing faster than expected on the uphill finish.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE gained time on the final uphill kilometer into Pau, reversing expected TT specialist advantage on technical climbing finish.
THOMAS Geraint lost 35 seconds to ALAPHILIPPE despite being favored, suggesting yellow jersey psychological boost outweighed pure TT power.
DEGENT crashed approaching finish while holding fastest time, revealing barriers positioned dangerously tight on technical right-hand bend.
BERNAL conceded 1:12 to THOMAS, finishing 20th and confirming clear team hierarchy favoring defending champion over climbing specialist.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Climbed final kilometer faster than pure TT specialists, indicating climbing form strong enough to defend GC in mountains
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Beat teammate BERNAL by 1:12, establishing himself as sole INEOS leader despite losing to ALAPHILIPPE
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: 20th place finish 2+ minutes down signals weakness in ITTs that makes him vulnerable in future grand tour GC battles
rider_signals.DEGENT Thomas: positive: Held fastest time before crash, confirming breakaway stage win reflected genuine form spike not just tactics
